sectionHeadings: 3. Risks the implementer must verify first
record.summary: After spec 018 sheds the toolchain payload, the remaining tree is restructured into two directories a developer understands at first glance: frontend/ (the SPA, one directory per flavor lifecycle) and backend/ (every Encore.ts service plus the shared lib and CoreLedger). Decided 2026-07-14, chosen over client/apis and app/services because frontend/backend is the pair with zero ambiguity. All Encore.ts concerns co-locate under backend/, which is what makes the chassis easy to reason about; everything else at the root is contract, packaging, or governance. Lands before statecraft spec 002 so the first template consumer imports the simple shape.
record.title: Template layout: frontend/ + backend/, nothing else to explain
